anonymize_ips.description: When true, PostHog drops the IP address from every ingested event.

autocapture_exceptions_opt_in.description: Enables automatic capture of JavaScript exceptions via the SDK.

autocapture_opt_out.description: Disables posthog-js autocapture (clicks, page views) when true.

autocapture_web_vitals_opt_in.description: Enables automatic capture of Core Web Vitals performance metrics.

business_model.description:
Whether this project serves B2B or B2C customers. Used to optimize default UI layouts.

* `b2b` - B2B
* `b2c` - B2C
* `other` - Other

capture_console_log_opt_in.description: Enables capturing browser console logs alongside session replays.

capture_performance_opt_in.description: Enables capturing performance timing and network requests.

conversations_enabled.description: Enables the customer conversations / live chat product for this project.

data_attributes.description: Element attributes that posthog-js should capture as action identifiers (e.g. `['data-attr']`).

flags_persistence_default.description: Default value for the `persist` option on newly created feature flags.

heatmaps_opt_in.description: Enables heatmap recording on pages that host posthog-js.

id.description: Project ID, or `@current` to target the caller's active project.

path_cleaning_filters.description: Regex rewrite rules that collapse dynamic path segments (e.g. user IDs) before displaying URLs in paths.

person_display_name_properties.description: Ordered list of person properties used to render a human-friendly display name in the UI.

primary_dashboard.description: ID of the dashboard shown as the project's default landing dashboard.

product_description.description: Short description of what the project is about. This is helpful to give our AI agents context about your project.

recording_domains.description: Origins permitted to record session replays and heatmaps. Empty list allows all origins.

session_recording_minimum_duration_milli.description: Skip saving sessions shorter than this many milliseconds.

session_recording_opt_in.description: Enables session replay recording for this project.

session_recording_retention_period.description:
How long to retain new session recordings. One of `30d`, `90d`, `1y`, or `5y` (availability depends on plan).

* `30d` - 30 Days
* `90d` - 90 Days
* `1y` - 1 Year
* `5y` - 5 Years

session_recording_sample_rate.description: Fraction of sessions to record, as a decimal string between `0.00` and `1.00` (e.g. `0.1` = 10%).

session_recording_trigger_groups.description: V2 trigger groups configuration for session recording. If present, takes precedence over legacy trigger fields.

surveys_opt_in.description: Enables displaying surveys via posthog-js on allowed origins.

test_account_filters.description: Filter groups that identify internal/test traffic to be excluded from insights.

test_account_filters_default_checked.description: When true, new insights default to excluding internal/test users.

week_start_day.description:
First day of the week for date range filters. 0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday.

* `0` - Sunday
* `1` - Monday
